---
title: "project"
image: images/IMG_3170.PNG
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/connerrob24/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/connerrob24/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/conner-robertson-3297532b8/
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
